name: restaurant-promo-section
title: Limited-Time Promo Section with Pulsing Dot Pill
description: Promotional landing section with a signature 'LIMITED TIME' pulsing-dot pill — a dark rounded pill with animate-ping nested dots and uppercase tracked text. Followed by a promo hero split (image + copy) and a horizontal-scrolling promotion card carousel. The PulsingDotPill is independently reusable for flash sales, live events, or urgency indicators.

preview.reason: Imports @/domains/shared/components (SectionHeading), @/domains/shared/section-tools (registry helpers, createSectionSchema), and @/lib/utils (cn). Requires restaurant-app-solo section registry pattern. Preserved as code-reference.
